sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL, sales_date DATE);
SELECT id, amount, nth_value(amount, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) AS second_value FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = nth_value(amount, 1) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, sales_date, nth_value(amount, 2 IGNORE NULLS) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_date ORDER BY id) AS second_value FROM sales;
